overall.description: Gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a player character in a golden halo exploring the crumbling ruins of a massive gothic cathedral. The character traverses stone terraces, broken pathways, and desolate ash-covered grounds beneath an overcast sky filled with floating debris and red glowing particles.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated stone terrace with circular tower

events.description: character turns right to follow the curved terrace path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the stone terrace, examining the gothic surroundings

entered.detail: round stone tower with arched windows and decorative columns
grey stone tile flooring with geometric patterns
massive stone wall with pointed arches and intricate carvings
rectangular stone planters containing withered vegetation

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a stone-paved terrace beside a prominent circular tower with arched windows. The area features decorative planters with dead vegetation and overlooks the massive gothic cathedral walls. The path curves gently to the right as the character explores the elevated ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: broken bridge walkway with cathedral view

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal floating debris and massive cathedral spires against the sky
camera returns to level position and continues walking forward

agents.ego_description: pausing to look up at the massive cathedral structure and floating debris in the sky before continuing

entered.detail: chunks of stone and rock floating in the sky against grey clouds
tall gothic spire with multiple levels of arches and flying buttresses
collapsed stone bridge with missing sections and exposed edges

segments.scene_description: The character moves along a broken walkway and looks up to admire the massive scale of the cathedral spires and floating debris in the overcast sky. The circular tower falls behind as the path leads toward a broken bridge section.

scene_state.functional_zone: rubble-strewn corridor leading to stone archway

events.description: ground surface changes from intact paving to broken rubble and uneven stones
character passes under the stone archway structure

agents.ego_description: carefully navigating through the rubble-strewn path toward the stone archway

entered.detail: stone arch with columns marking the entrance to the inner ruins
heap of broken stone blocks and debris from collapsed structures
leafless trees with twisted branches scattered among the ruins

segments.scene_description: The path becomes increasingly ruined with broken cobblestones and rubble piles. The character approaches and passes through a stone archway, with dead trees becoming visible among the ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: desolate ash wasteland with circular platform

events.description: environment shifts from stone ruins to desolate ash-covered wasteland with dead trees
character approaches lootable corpse with glowing white item

agents.ego_description: walking through the desolate ash field toward a corpse with a glowing item

notable_agents.action: dead corpse lying on circular platform with glowing white loot item

entered.detail: grey ash-covered earth with scattered debris and dead vegetation
raised circular stone dais with carved patterns
collapsed stone archway partially buried in ash

segments.scene_description: The character enters a desolate wasteland covered in grey ash and scattered with dead trees. Walking toward a circular stone platform, the character discovers a corpse bearing a glowing white item, indicating lootable goods.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the elevated stone terraces of a gothic cathedral down into a desolate, ash-covered wasteland. It begins with the character walking along a paved path beside a circular tower with arched windows, curving gently past decorative planters of dead vegetation. As the character moves forward, the tower recedes and the view opens upward toward massive spires and floating debris in an overcast sky before the path leads toward a broken bridge. The scene then shifts as the walkway becomes increasingly ruined with rubble and broken cobblestones, guiding the character through a stone archway where dead trees first appear. Finally, the environment expands into a grey wasteland of ash and skeletal trees, ending as the character approaches a circular stone platform to discover a glowing white item on a corpse.
